kunculu-akit-lezzet.name: Xəbərlər
instructions: 1. Roast the sesame in 10 minutes jealous fire in the lean pan.
3. Add walnuts to it and add snow.
4. Aluminum foil cool on oven tray.
5. Pour the mixture with sesame in thin layer.
6. Cook for 10 minutes in the oven set to 175 degrees.
7. Remove sesame from the oven without burning.
